personalInfo.name: Abhishek Verma
personalInfo.title: Full Stack Developer
personalInfo.summary: Full Stack Developer with 4+ years of experience building scalable, data-driven web applications using React, Next.js, Node.js, and Python. Experienced in integrating Generative AI features such as LLM-powered chat, document analysis, and AI scoring into production systems.

siteConfig.title: Abhishek Verma | Full Stack Developer
siteConfig.description: Full Stack Developer with 4+ years of experience building scalable web applications with React, Next.js, Node.js, and Generative AI integration.

highlights: Leading frontend development for web and mobile applications, focusing on scalable UI architecture, performance optimization, and maintainable component systems.
Built and delivered Generative AI–driven projects, integrating LLM-powered features such as AI analysis, multimedia responses, document research, summarization, and workflow automation.
Collaborated with backend and product teams to design APIs and data flows supporting AI-powered features and real-time interactions.
Owned frontend architecture decisions and mentored team members during feature development and releases.
Delivered full-stack solutions for enterprise clients including KPMG, RBL, Vodafone, Indian Oil, American Express, Croma, and Asian Paints.
Led client discussions to gather requirements, proposed technical solutions, and owned the execution of key features across multiple projects.
Built scalable React and Next.js applications while integrating backend APIs and authentication flows.
Worked on in-house full stack web applications, contributing to feature development, problem-solving, and clean code practices.
Gained foundational experience in React, Node.js, and production deployment workflows.

projects.title: Sophius AI
projects.description: Led frontend development and complete architectural redesign of an AI-powered platform. Reduced bundle size by 50%, built in-browser code editor, AI image editor, Plotly dashboards, and shipped Android/iOS apps via WebView.
highlights: Built in-browser code editor/runner, AI-integrated image editor, interactive Plotly dashboards, and Google Maps–based visualizations.
Integrated Generative AI workflows using LangChain for AI responses, document research, multimedia multilanguage outputs.
Developed and shipped Android and iOS applications using WebView-based architecture.
Reduced bundle size and improved load performance by 50% through code splitting and Service Workers.

projects.title: Indian Oil Dashboard
projects.description: Designed and implemented the frontend architecture for Indian Oil's enterprise platform. Redesigned with Vite.js, Web Workers, and React Memoization — improving UI performance by 50%.
highlights: Optimized and redesigned components using Vite.js, Web Workers and React Memoization Technique.
Enhanced UI performance and scalability by up to 50%.

projects.title: Lepton Maps
projects.description: Data visualization dashboard using DeckGL.js, providing stakeholders with real-time insights and improving decision-making processes.
highlights: Built role-based dynamic user interfaces with real-time data visualization.
Built a CI/CD pipeline using Git and Vercel, reducing deployment time by 40%.

projects.title: Smart Market
projects.description: Enterprise application with role-based dynamic UI, resizable panels, data caching, and reusable component packages.
highlights: Converted data fetching to Tanstack Query for enhanced performance with large datasets.
Implemented Web Workers and custom hooks with React Memoization for 45% UI performance improvement.

projects.title: API Health Monitor
projects.description: API health check system integrated with Slack and email notifications for real-time API monitoring and failure tracking.
highlights: Built health check script with Slack and email integration for markdown-designed failure notifications.
Track records in database to show tracking and API status on the UI.

projects.title: RBL Gateway
projects.description: Secure communication gateway with OpenPGP encryption for banking operations and secure transactions.
highlights: Implemented secure communication with encryption using OpenPGP.
Established a secure gateway for banking transactions.

projects.title: Smart Campus
projects.description: 3D visualization platform with Three.js for enhanced telecom client campus visibility and interactive navigation.
highlights: Created 3D objects and buildings for telecom client visualization.
Real-time 3D rendering with interactive campus navigation.
